changeSet.author: mosque-crm
changeSet.comment: All non-SUPER_ADMIN roles get all non-superadmin permissions as their assignable pool
changeSet.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO role_assignable_permissions (role_id, permission_id) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM roles r CROSS JOIN permissions p WHERE r.name != 'SUPER_ADMIN' AND p.category != 'superadmin';

changeSet.author: mosque-crm
changeSet.comment: Re-sync pool to pick up permissions added after the initial seed (id 42-76). INSERT IGNORE is idempotent.
changeSet.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO role_assignable_permissions (role_id, permission_id) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM roles r CROSS JOIN permissions p WHERE r.name != 'SUPER_ADMIN' AND p.category != 'superadmin';
